name: Wild Mushroom Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic and onions and sauté for 6 to 7 minutes. Add mushrooms, parsley, and thyme, and sauté for an additional 5 minutes. Stir in wine. Simmer for 5 minutes and set aside.
In a saucepan, make a roux with butter, flour, and nutmeg. Stir in broth and milk. Cook until the sauce thickens. Stir in fontina cheese.
In the bottom of a 12" x 8" baking dish, arrange one-third noodles. Spread with one-quarter mushroom mixture and one-fourth of the sauce. Repeat, finishing with sauce. Sprinkle with mozzarella and Parmesan. Cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes. Remove foil and bake an additional 10 minutes.
